changes: Advance the packaged scroller DLL to fa_ui_scroller.0.0.9.dll so VaM sees a fresh internal plugin artifact as well as the fresh dev package identity.
Keep the compile-time generated catalog path that removed prohibited runtime System.IO usage from the plugin.
Preserve the Joystick Scroller public title and advance the package-first dev testing lane to FrameAngel.JoystickScrollerDev.3.var.
